fixtures.name: agent_doc_supervisor
fixtures.description: agent-doc read-only/advisory projection (0.2.0 backward-compatibility baseline; no ports/telemetry/io bindings)

fixtures.name: patchboard_attention_router
fixtures.description: patchboard feature window, trainable model, gate, and small-agent projection with typed ports, live cable telemetry, and one ingress + one egress webhook binding

fixtures.name: patchboard_io_rack
fixtures.description: patchboard rack exercising every IoBinding transport (timer, stdin_jsonl, file_tail, webhook, websocket ingress; webhook, websocket, notify, exec, mcp egress)

fixtures.name: patchboard_supervisor
fixtures.description: agent-supervisor rack: repo/CI/test/agent-doc signals -> feature window -> continuation scorer (MLP) -> supervisor gate -> advisory wake-agent / ask-human / reroute egress bindings (never direct)

fixtures.name: patchboard_webhook_triage
fixtures.description: n8n-style webhook triage workflow template (category=workflow_template): webhook ingress -> feature window -> MLP anomaly scorer -> approval gate -> small_agent triage -> webhook egress. Exercises agent + MLP + outside-service ingress/egress.

fixtures.name: patchboard_scheduled_anomaly
fixtures.description: n8n-style scheduled anomaly workflow template (category=workflow_template): timer + file_tail ingress -> feature window -> MLP anomaly scorer -> approval gate -> large_agent responder -> desktop notify egress.

fixtures.name: patchboard_event_fanout
fixtures.description: n8n-style event fan-out workflow template (category=workflow_template): websocket ingress -> feature window -> deterministic transform switch -> MLP router -> approval gate fanning out to webhook + exec + mcp egress.

invariants: all edge endpoints refer to existing nodes
derived state fields are not writable
trainable_model.lifecycle appears only when the decision advertises the matching capability
proposed intents cannot silently upgrade advisory or gated authority to direct
direct authority is never the default authority for these fixtures
state_chart initial and current values are declared states
state_chart transitions only reference declared states
port ids are unique within a node
edges that name from_port/to_port resolve to existing jacks with matching dtypes (out -> in)
ingress io_bindings appear only on source nodes
egress io_bindings appear only on gate or output nodes
egress io_bindings never carry direct authority
